{"query":"INSERT INTO produktionsAnlagenConfig (intTp_ID,unt_ID, mst_ID,prd_id,anl_id,anl_col,startDate,endDate,startWeek,endWeek,ending,note,einheitControlSys,iBdeType,mstIMw,min_val,max_val) VALUES ('1', '2', '176', '' , '' , '' , '2021-08-04', '', '','', '1', '','2' , '2','Test 684','35','175') "}
